SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.title: Mpesa Prompting App
SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.description: A full-stack M-Pesa payment application built with Safaricom Daraja API, featuring STK Push payments, real-time transaction status updates, callback handling, and seamless payment verification.

SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.title: Personal Portfolio
SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.description: A fully responsive personal portfolio built from scratch with React and Vite. Features a dark/light theme toggle, intersection observer scroll animations, a live GitHub activity calendar, and a filterable projects section.

SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.title: Simple Dictionary Website
SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.description: A sleek, responsive dictionary SPA with real-time lexicon queries, asynchronous API integration for word definitions and phonetics, and an optimized client-side search engine.

SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.title: Coffee Shop Page
SOFTWARE_PROJECTS.description: A fully interactive React SPA configured as a mock full-stack environment, featuring a local REST API powered by json-server for real-time CRUD operation simulation.

GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.title: Graphic Design Portfolio
GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.description: This graphic design portfolio showcases a diverse collection of creative commercial work, conceptual advertisements, and technical illustrations, demonstrating a strong command over industry-standard design suites and generative tools.

GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.title: Magical Kenya Promotion
GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.description: The design above is a sample advertisement for the Ritz-Carlton hotel. It features a table set up for an evening meal. In the vicinity, an antelope is eating grass eyeing the delicacy. In the background,the biannual wildebeest migration is ongoing.

GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.title: Toxic Lyrikali Poster
GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.description: The design beside features a poster of popular Kenyan artist Toxic Lyrikali. It features the artist’s image, a Mercedes S-Class, a woman’s bosom , a Mercedes hood ornament in rectangular frames and have used various effects. The design has been constructed using a brutalist manner.

GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.title: Coca-Cola Ad
GRAPHIC_PROJECTS.description: A sample advertisement campaign for the company Coca-Cola. It features Santa Claus in a sled with various gifts displaying a Coca-Cola Bottle to the camera. Three lions, visibly starving, are astounded by the flying antelopes. In the background, a view of Nairobi City is visible.
